hero.subtitle: Global partners: steady delivery and clear reporting.
hero.guideCaption: Stylized guide figure — swap in your final brand artwork

why.title: Why us
why.lead: We don’t trade random clicks. We engineer the path to your KPI—from first touch to the action that matters—with quality checks at every step.

stability.title: Stability
stability.body: Predictable volume and cadence: fewer stalls, more time on combinations that actually work.

quality.title: Quality control
quality.body: We vet sources, creatives, and audience–offer fit so traffic stays clean.

support.title: Fast support
support.body: Real people in chat: angles, bundle fixes, or a quick campaign tweak when you need it.

professionalism.title: Experience & horizon
professionalism.body: Hands-on buying: unit economics and durable growth beat one-day spikes.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.body: Stats and reports you can use—lead source and funnel behavior, clearly.

scaling.title: Scale
scaling.body: We grow volume where the bundle is proven—without jumps that wreck conversion.

models.title: Engagement models
models.subtitle: Three core formats—for different products and funnel maturity
models.ctaLine: Want a CPL, CRG, or CPA outline? Leave your contacts—we’ll reply with a structure and next steps.

cpl.name: CPL
cpl.body: Cost Per Lead—you pay for qualified leads when you need volume with a clear cost per entry.

crg.name: CRG
crg.body: Cost Revenue Generated—tied to revenue; we push harder on quality when your upside scales with performance.

cpa.name: CPA
cpa.body: Cost Per Action—pay for the target action (signup, deposit, etc.) when the KPI is fixed and measurable.

about.title: About us
about.p1: We’re a media buying team with 3+ years in digital traffic. We know which bundles last longer than a week and how to scale without trashing quality.
about.p2: We’re not here for a one-off drop—we want partnerships that compound: steady revenue growth and constant tuning where it moves the needle.
about.p3: Every engagement is bespoke: sources, creatives, and the cooperation model are picked so you get maximum conversion with transparent, fair terms.
about.ctaLine: Want to talk funnel, geo, and realistic volumes? Message us—we’ll propose a lean start without red tape.

principle1.title: Conversion first
principle1.body: Quality traffic means actions you can monetize—not vanity clicks.

principle2.title: Long-term relationships
principle2.body: We win when your bundle runs for months, not when it burns in three days.

principle3.title: Openness and transparency
principle3.body: Clear rules and numbers from test to scale—no mystery metrics.

careers.title: Careers
careers.lead: We’re hiring an Affiliate Manager to grow partner relationships and scale traffic without sacrificing quality.
careers.roleRequirements: At least 1 year in affiliate, media buying, or a related role—partners, offers, reporting, and day-to-day chat with partners.
careers.applyIntro: Apply via the site form or Telegram—mention the role so we can route your message quickly.

start.title: How to get started
start.lead: Getting started is simple: you frame the job—we bring the sources, process, and expertise to the first stable read on performance.
start.step1: Submit a request on the site—a couple of minutes, and we already see context: vertical, geo, preferred model.
start.step2: We reach out—align on goals, risk tolerance, and what “success” means in your numbers.
start.step3: We agree on strategy and format—CPL, CRG, or CPA: whichever fits your product best.
start.step4: Campaign launch—we run traffic, watch the curve, and quickly tighten what improves CPL/ROI.
start.closing: You get more than “traffic for traffic’s sake”—a partner invested in growing your business the way you would.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a0: We don’t sell clicks for their own sake—we build funnels around your KPIs, keep traffic quality in check, and share clear reporting. Fast communication, transparent terms, and a partnership mindset built for the long run.
faq.a1: We support APIs and CRM-friendly flows—less manual work, more automation from lead to status in your stack.
faq.a2: Yes—postpay with strong references and a clear track record; prepay by agreement for specific launch terms.
faq.q3: Which traffic sources do you use?
faq.a3:
Google, Yandex, Meta (Facebook)
MGID, Push, MSN
Taboola on request and prepay only.
faq.q4: How soon will I see results?
faq.a4: Stable conversion signals often show within the first days—we don’t wait for miracles; we read the data and adjust fast.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Tell us briefly what you need—we’ll come back with a model, timing, and the next step.
contact.name: Name
contact.consent: By submitting, you agree to the processing of personal data.
contact.success: Request received. We’ll contact you soon.
contact.successNote: Messenger integration is added separately — this demo stores the submission locally.
contact.errorGeneric: Could not send. Try again later or message us on Telegram.

footer.tagline: We deliver outcomes, think long-term, and keep our word with partners.

messages.core: We deliver results · Long-term focus · Quality traffic · Reliable partner
